Methodology
Each campaign is measured against its own objective. Lead campaigns show CPL, engagement campaigns show cost per engagement, traffic campaigns show cost per landing page view. Insights use account-relative P25/P75 percentiles with suppression rules - upstream causes override downstream symptoms.

Finding
30 leads from $14,743 across 28 ads. Blended CPL: $491. 20 ads spent $4,957 with zero leads. Only 8 of 28 ads converting.

Engagement Campaigns (1 ads - $812.84)

Data source: Meta Ads API (act_9633160773399349) via export_insights at ad level.
Leads: Pixel lead events. Engagement: Reactions + comments + shares + saves.
Insights: Account-relative P25/P75 percentiles with contextual alert rules and suppression.
Lifecycle: LEARNING (<7 days or <1K impressions), REPORTABLE (meets thresholds), FATIGUED (30+ days with declining CTR).
Strategy recommendations: Based on account-relative percentiles across active ads.
